ops.text:
RESULTS (E15 complete; ~$11 opus spend, 5×72 re-votes at 76-108s each, 0 failures).

FRAMES (actual counts): sentinel scores watcher_eval.parquet n=628 (335 pos/293 neg) — THE b35bae5 "~631" frame. gate_eval.parquet n=1325 (1032/293) is scored by the GATE stage, not the sentinel. Both share 293 negatives. Stored probs v002...cdfabf2f reproduce AUC=0.9316896744944222 exactly.

(b) ROW-SAMPLING SE (n=628): bootstrap 0.00996 (stratified), Hanley-McNeil 0.01029, DeLong 0.00998 — three methods agree ~0.010. n=1325: 0.00665. Scorer deterministic (no seed). 95% CI on a single AUC = ±0.020 at n=628.

(c) JUDGE/LABEL NOISE (72 rows ×5 fresh clones, E8): Fleiss kappa is_steering=0.878, category=0.849; mean pairwise Cohen kappa 0.879. 12.5% of rows non-unanimous across 5 re-votes; pooled positive->noise flip rate 17.7%. STRUCTURE: flips concentrate in small strata — direction (72% of eval positives) 0.00 flip, premature 0.00, style_violation 0.05, wrong_approach 0.10, unwanted_action 0.40, incorrect_change 0.66. Label-noise AUC SE: 0.00562 (flip/re-judge model), 0.00338 (drop model).

(d) DECOMPOSITION: Var(AUC)=Var_row+Var_label; row-sampling dominant (SE 0.0100 vs label 0.0056). Total marginal SE(n=628)=0.0114 additive / 0.0101 joint-MC; SE(n=1325)=0.0076. MDE=(z.975+z.80)*SE_delta=2.8016*SE_delta. Generalization/unpaired MDE: 0.0453 (n=628), 0.0303 (n=1325). Paired same-frame needs rho (2nd probs vector unstored -> BLIND SPOT): rho0.9->0.0143, rho0.99->0.0045.

(e) RECLASSIFICATION — every historical AUC-delta verdict on the frozen frame is UNDER-POWERED:
- b35bae5 P6 rejection Δ0.0009: UNDER-POWERED (0.02x MDE; resolvable only at implausible rho>=0.9996 + a paired DeLong test never run).
- sweep 9b vs 8b Δ0.0070: under-powered (rho>=0.976 needed). 9b vs incumbent Δ0.0054: rho>=0.986. 8b vs 4b Δ0.0039: rho>=0.993. best-vs-worst 9b vs 35b Δ0.0142: rho>=0.902. The ENTIRE P6 arm spread (0.9229-0.9371=0.0142) sits inside the unpaired noise band -> no arm ranking resolvable as executed.
- SOUND (unchanged): fresh-epoch promotions w/ no incumbent (v002@0.9317, v001@0.8534 — promotion by existence); E9 sign-test p=1.0 (correctly null); E7 fired-count gates; E11 prose AUC<=0.6 coarse gate.

DELIVERABLES: instrument_card.json + instrument_card.md in out/. Raw artifacts kept for independent re-derivation: bootstrap npy/csv, mc_label_*/combined npy, votes_rep1..5.json, sample.json/keys, label_noise_report.json. Clone DBs removed (reproducible from base + prep_clone.py). Scripts in E15/scripts/.

RECOMMENDATIONS: (1) treat sentinel-AUC deltas < ~0.045 (n=628 frame) as non-signal per note b35bae5; (2) persist BOTH checkpoints' per-row probs so the gate can run a paired DeLong test (collapses the paired MDE and closes the blind spot); (3) the 293-negative minority class is the variance bottleneck in BOTH frames — widening it (not the positives) is the highest-leverage instrument improvement.
